# ‏סטארטאפ ירין — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A startup company looking to build a landing page with user registration functionality (phone number and name), featuring images throughout the site. The focus is on lead generation and sign-ups.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
סטארטאפ ירין מזמין אתכם להירשם עכשיו עם שם ומספר טלפון ולהיות חלק מהדור הבא של חברות טכנולוגיות. גלו תמונות מעוררות השראה והתחילו את המסע שלכם עוד היום!

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `email` (email)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About ‏סטארטאפ ירין
A startup company looking to build a landing page with user registration functionality (phone number and name), featuring images throughout the site. The focus is on lead generation and sign-ups.

## Target Audience
- מאמצי טכנולוגיה מוקדמים
- בעלי עסקים קטנים
- יזמים צעירים

## Industry
Technology / Startup

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
